name: QBR / Account Review
description: For quarterly or periodic client business reviews: performance against goals, wins, risks, and what's next.

sections.title: Account Overview
sections.instruction: State the client/account name and the review period covered.

sections.title: Attendees
sections.instruction: List attendees and their roles or companies

sections.title: Performance Against Goals
sections.instruction: Summarize how the account has performed against previously agreed goals or KPIs, using specific figures where stated.

sections.title: Wins & Highlights
sections.instruction: List concrete wins, achievements, or positive outcomes discussed.

sections.title: Challenges & Risks
sections.instruction: List challenges, risks, or areas of concern raised by either side.

sections.title: Upcoming Initiatives
sections.instruction: List initiatives, projects, or opportunities planned for the next period.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: List commitments with owner and due date, including the speaker's own first-person commitments owned by "Me".
